## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`cargo clippy --workspace`, `cargo fmt --all`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
